meaning: n.血汗工厂(指工人劳动条件差,工作时间长,工资低的工场或工厂)
examples: The premises are small, but this is no sweatshop.
While a factory job might not be great, he said, it was no sweatshop.
In its report, Apple revealed the sweatshop conditions inside the factories it USES.
One of these sweatshop factories had made clothes destined for the UK in recent months.
So compared to how rich Indonesia is those sweatshop wages actually look pretty good.
